title: Add npm publish workflow with GitHub Actions
Add tsconfig.json with TypeScript strict mode, fix type errors, and add CI test workflow
notes: COMPLETED: tsconfig.json with strict mode, types.d.ts with full OMP type surface, all type errors fixed (tsc --noEmit=0), CI workflow at .github/workflows/ci.yml (typecheck+test on push/PR). Verification: 12/12 tests pass, npm run typecheck pass, npm test pass, YAML valid.

title: Add /lilac models slash command with supply-aware model browser
acceptance_criteria: /lilac-models displays formatted table of all Lilac models with pricing, supply, vision, and context | Active model visually highlighted | Discounted pricing matches footer status | TypeScript compiles zero errors | All 12 existing tests pass
notes: COMPLETED: Added /lilac-models slash command with supply-aware model browser. 3 files changed (index.ts +88 lines, types/omp.d.ts +13 lines, scripts/test-discounts.ts +78 lines). Implements formatModelsTable with 8-column table (Name, Input/Output/Cache pricing, Supply, Discount%, Vision, Context), active model → highlighting, zero-cost — display, /lilac models alias via input handler. All 16 tests pass, tsc --noEmit clean.
agent_context: {"objective":"Add /lilac-models slash command that displays all Lilac models in a formatted supply-aware table using ctx.ui.setWidget()","constraints":{"MUST":["Register command via pi.registerCommand(\"lilac-models\", ...)","Store latest models at module level for command handler access","Display model name, input/output/cache pricing, supply state, discount%, vision support, context window","Update types/omp.d.ts to declare setWidget in UIApi","npx tsc --noEmit exits 0","npm test passes all 12 tests"],"SHOULD":["Support /lilac models (space alias) as alternate invocation","Highlight currently active Lilac model in table","Show table immediately with stale models before live fetch completes"]},"files":{"allowed":["index.ts","types/omp.d.ts","scripts/test-discounts.ts"],"forbidden":[]}}

title: Add npm publish workflow with GitHub Actions
Add daily model-update GitHub Actions workflow
agent_context: {"objective":"Create a daily scheduled GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/update-models.yml) that runs npm run update-models, detects changes to models.json and README.md, commits them, and opens a PR against main for human review. Uses LILAC_API_KEY secret and GITHUB_TOKEN for auth.","constraints":{"MUST":["Daily cron trigger at 8 AM UTC","Run npm run update-models via scripts/update-models.js","Detect git diff on models.json and README.md","Auto-commit changes if any","Create PR against main with descriptive body","Use LILAC_API_KEY from GitHub Secrets","Use concurrency group to prevent overlapping runs"],"SHOULD":["workflow_dispatch for manual runs","Handle API failures gracefully (no stale PR)","Branch naming: auto/update-models-YYYY-MM-DD"]},"files":{"allowed":[".github/workflows/update-models.yml"],"forbidden":["scripts/update-models.js","models.json","README.md","package.json","package-lock.json"]}}
